When the Government respond in full to the recommendations, I will set out any resource implications not just for the work of the Home Office, but... Read more → Southport Inquiry 13 Apr 2026 Commons debates My hon. Friend raises an important point. He is absolutely right that the failure of any one organisation or group of individuals to take responsibility for the perpetrator is one of the key... Read more → Southport Inquiry 13 Apr 2026 Commons debates The hon. Gentleman is right that it is one thing to bring about changes and to change professional practice, but that these things should be enforced properly. When the Government respond in full... Read more → Southport Inquiry 13 Apr 2026 Commons debates My hon. Friend makes an important point. The Government have already taken steps to shore up the provision of mental health services within the national health service, and I am joined today on... Read more → Southport Inquiry 13 Apr 2026 Commons debates It is a big ask, and I am very clear that this must be a moment of change. I do not want to be standing here with a future tragedy, saying the same things that have been said in response to what... Read more → Southport Inquiry 13 Apr 2026 Commons debates My hon. Friend notes one of the key failures, which related to the question of who the risk was to. In this case, too many of the internal assessments were of the risk to the perpetrator himself,... I think this is the first time that she and I have had an interaction on this matter, so I... Read more → Southpor

pages.title: Advice Surgeries - Shabana Mahmood
pages.meta_description: Member of Parliament for Birmingham Ladywood
pages.text_excerpt: Advice Surgeries - Shabana Mahmood Skip to main content Shabana Mahmood Member of Parliament for Birmingham Ladywood Tiktok Facebook Donate News In Parliament Advice Centres Contact More Menu Advice Surgeries Advice Centres are held in person and online. 💡 If your case is about housing or immigration, most queries can be dealt with over email. Please email [email protected] as a first point of contact. Shabana runs advice centres in different parts of the constituency, including a virtual surgery. Attendance is now by appointment only. You can book by emailing Shabana’s parliamentary email address on this page. You can talk to a member of Shabana’s team about anything from Housing to Repairs, Universal Credit to Litter and Dumping. Please note that we are not able to provide legal advice. If your issue is urgent please email [email protected] and we will reply as soon as possible. See more on Facebook Shabana Mahmood Contact details Email: [email protected] Further details Promoted by the West Midlands Labour Party on behalf of Shabana Mahmood all at 1Unit 4302, Waterside Centre, B37 7YN. ©2026 Copyright Shabana Mahmood MP all rights reserved. headings: h2: If you are a constituent of Birmingham Ladywood…
pages.text_excerpt: Contact - Shabana Mahmood Skip to main content Shabana Mahmood Member of Parliament for Birmingham Ladywood Tiktok Facebook Donate News In Parliament Advice Centres Contact More Menu Contact Standing up for Birmingham Ladywood. 💡 I maintain an office to serve my constituents as the Member of Parliament for Birmingham Ladywood. My constituency team do not deal with enquiries relating to my role as Home Secretary. Visit the Home Office website for contact details . If you are a constituent of Birmingham Ladywood… Most cases can be solved quickly over email. If your issue is urgent, please get in touch using the information below. pages.title: Shabana joins launch of Labour’s plan for Birmingham - Shabana Mahmood
pages.h1: Shabana joins launch of Labour’s plan for Birmingham
pages.meta_description: Member of Parliament for Birmingham Ladywood
pages.text_excerpt: Shabana joins launch of Labour’s plan for Birmingham - Shabana Mahmood Skip to main content Shabana Mahmood Member of Parliament for Birmingham Ladywood Tiktok Facebook Donate News In Parliament Advice Centres Contact More Menu 20th April, 2026 Shabana joins launch of Labour’s plan for Birmingham Shabana has joined candidates, members, and supported to launch Labour’s plan for Birmingham. On 7th May residents across Birmingham go to the polls to elect 101 councillors. Labour’s plan will build on the progress made at Birmingham City Council to close the budget gap and improve services for residents. As part of the plan, Birmingham Labour will: Invest £40million in street cleaning over the next 3 years. Ensure there is a named, contactable police officer for every neighbourhood. Deliver £180million of Pride in Place funding in neighbourhoods across Birmingham. In her remarks, Shabana welcomed a slate of new candidates in Birmingham Ladywood with fresh ambition for our city. Full list of candidates Shabana Mahmood Contact details Email: [email protected] Further details Promoted by the West Midlands Labour Party on behalf of Shabana Mahmood all at 1Unit 4302, Waterside Centre, B37 7YN. ©2026 Copyright Shabana Mahmood MP all rights reserved.
